overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a futuristic highway during a heavy rainstorm at night. The drive transitions from industrial outskirts to a dense neon-lit urban center with multiple elevated roadways and overpasses.

events.description: accelerating rapidly while overtaking a blue sedan on the right
approaching the first highway overpass structure in the distance

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the wet highway from a standstill, overtaking vehicles on the right

notable_agents.action: blue sedan driving ahead in the same lane before being overtaken
yellow truck passing on the right side of the highway

entered.detail: rain-slicked asphalt with reflective lane markings visible through windshield
tall concrete wall running parallel to the highway on the right side
low-rise industrial structure with minimal lighting in the background
tall street light pole illuminating the wet road surface

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a rain-soaked industrial highway at night, with the vehicle accelerating from low speed. The camera passes a blue sedan and yellow truck while concrete sound barriers line the right side and industrial buildings sit in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway interchange with concrete overpasses

events.description: passing under the first concrete overpass, temporarily sheltering from rain
distant pink neon signs become visible, indicating transition to commercial zone

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed through highway interchange, navigating under multiple overpasses

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle with glowing red taillights ahead on the highway

entered.detail: concrete overpass spanning across the highway with support pillars
faint pink neon signage visible in the far distance on the right

segments.scene_description: The vehicle speeds through a highway interchange, passing under concrete overpasses that provide brief shelter from the rain. The environment transitions from industrial to commercial as distant neon signs appear on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban highway with dense commercial signage

events.description: entering dense neon district with multiple large digital billboards and elevated walkways
navigating through moderate traffic with vehicles changing lanes frequently

agents.ego_description: speeding through the neon-lit city center, weaving between other vehicles on the multi-lane highway

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving parallel in the right lane
red sports car overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: multiple large digital billboards with bright pink and red neon advertising displays
elevated pedestrian bridge or highway structure with metal railings
tall building with illuminated windows and neon architectural accents
large circular red neon signage mounted on building facade
building front with multiple illuminated windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The drive enters a vibrant neon-lit urban district with dense commercial signage and towering skyscrapers. The vehicle weaves through moderate traffic while passing bright pink billboards and elevated walkways on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated highway with blue-green lighting

events.description: entering fully covered highway section with artificial ceiling lighting and tunnel-like atmosphere
slight lane adjustment to avoid slower traffic ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through covered highway sections with blue-green overhead lighting, maintaining high speed

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving ahead in the same lane
blue sports car driving parallel on the right side

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with embedded blue-green LED lighting strips
large concrete column supporting the overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a covered elevated highway with blue-green artificial lighting and concrete support pillars. The vehicle maintains high speed through this tunnel-like section while other traffic moves alongside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transforms from a rain-soaked industrial highway into a dense, neon-lit urban corridor. It begins with the vehicle accelerating past a blue sedan and yellow truck along a road lined with concrete barriers and distant industrial buildings. As the car speeds through a highway interchange, the environment shifts from industrial to commercial, passing under concrete overpasses that offer brief shelter from the rain while neon signs emerge on the horizon. The scene then expands into a vibrant urban district where the vehicle weaves through traffic amidst towering skyscrapers, bright pink billboards, and elevated walkways. Finally, the drive transitions into a covered elevated highway, moving at high speed through a tunnel-like section defined by concrete pillars and blue-green artificial lighting.
